name: AuQ Gold Mining Inc.
summary: AuQ Gold Mining Inc., an exploration stage company, engages in the exploration of resource properties in Canada. The company holds 100% interest in the Kirkland Creek gold property comprising 40 contiguous claims located in the Ashihik Lake region to the northwest of Whitehorse, Yukon. It also holds interest in the Partridge gold project that comprises various mineral properties totaling 107.2 square kilometers located in the Abitibi region of northwestern Quebec. It also has an option to acquire a 70% interest in the Bellechasse Timmins gold property located in the Beauce Region of Southern Quebec. The company was formerly known as Royal Gold Mining Inc. and changed its name to AuQ Gold Mining Inc. in November 2020. AuQ Gold Mining Inc. was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
